variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17433 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17433 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17433 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25250 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17433
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25250 axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
